taxonomy: × Laeliocattleya dormaniana is classified as a hybrid orchid. It belongs to the genus Laeliocattleya, which is a cross between the genera Laelia and Cattleya. Laeliocattleya is a subgenus of the genus Cattleya, and × Laeliocattleya dormaniana specifically is a hybrid between Laelia anceps and Cattleya warscewiczii. This hybrid orchid classification helps in understanding its unique characteristics and growth habits. The classification of × Laeliocattleya dormaniana also provides insight into its parent species and their evolutionary relationships.
